base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_hurt — a character from 1986 castlevania. Knockback pose — body arched backward, arm raised. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Knockback pose — body arched backward, arm raised; plays on damage. Sprite flickers for invulnerability window
